title: AI Writing Tools for Solopreneurs in 2026: ChatGPT vs Jasper vs Copy.ai vs Notion AI
description: ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, Notion AI, and Writesonic compared. Pricing, trade-offs, and which tool fits your workflow.
tldr: ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, and Notion AI lack publicly available pricing or feature details as of May 2026. Writesonic positions itself as an AI search visibility platform starting at $79/mo, not a traditional writing tool. For solopreneurs seeking straightforward writing assistance, contact vendors directly for current plans and pricing.

body.text: Solopreneurs need writing tools that ship fast, fit tight budgets, and integrate into existing workflows. This review covers ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, Notion AI, and Writesonic—five names frequently cited in creator communities. The challenge: as of May 2026, vendor pages for four of the five tools returned no pricing or feature data. Writesonic's page focused exclusively on AI search visibility tracking, not content generation. What follows is what we know, what we don't, and where to dig further.

We attempted to retrieve vendor pricing pages, feature lists, and integration documentation for each tool. ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, and Notion AI returned no accessible vendor data. Writesonic's pricing page detailed plans for AI search visibility—tracking brand mentions in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews—but did not surface traditional writing-tool features or standalone content-generation pricing. No user reviews, case studies, or third-party benchmarks were available in the research bundle.

body.name: ChatGPT
pros: Frequently cited as general-purpose AI assistant
cons: No vendor pricing page available as of May 2026
Feature set and plan tiers unconfirmed

body.text: No vendor page was accessible. Pricing, plan structure, API access, and integration capabilities remain unconfirmed. Solopreneurs should contact OpenAI directly or check community forums for current details.

body.name: Jasper
pros: Historically marketed for marketing copy and long-form content
cons: No vendor pricing page available as of May 2026
Template library, integrations, and output quality unverified

body.text: No vendor page was accessible. Plan pricing, word limits, team seats, and API availability are unknown. Reach out to Jasper's sales team for a quote and feature rundown.

body.name: Copy.ai
pros: Positioned for short-form ad copy and social content
cons: No vendor pricing page available as of May 2026
Workflow integrations and output customization unconfirmed

body.text: No vendor page was accessible. Pricing tiers, monthly word credits, and platform integrations remain unspecified. Contact Copy.ai for current plans.

body.name: Notion AI
pros: Useful for users already managing projects in Notion
cons: No vendor pricing page available as of May 2026
Feature scope and add-on cost structure unverified

body.text: No vendor page was accessible. Whether Notion AI is bundled with workspace plans or sold separately, and at what price, is unknown. Check Notion's pricing page or contact support.

body.name: Writesonic
body.price: Starter $79/mo, Basic $199/mo, Growth $399/mo, Enterprise custom (annual billing available with 20% discount)
pros: AI search visibility tracking across ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Overviews
Includes AI article generation and site audits in all paid plans
Action Center and sentiment analysis on Growth plan and above
cons: Pricing page emphasizes AI search monitoring, not standalone writing
Article and audit quotas may not fit pure content-generation workflows
Multi-user seats and project limits scale slowly across tiers

body.text: Writesonic's vendor pricing page lists four plans. Starter ($79/mo, billed annually) tracks ChatGPT mentions, includes 15 AI articles per month, and 10 site audits (100 pages each). Basic ($199/mo) expands tracking to ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews, with 25 AI articles and 20 site audits (1,200 pages each). Growth ($399/mo) adds sentiment analysis, an Action Center trial (5 off-page and 5 on-page actions per month), 50 AI articles, and 50 site audits (2,500 pages each). Enterprise is custom, with full access to 10 AI platforms, unlimited Action Center, custom article and audit volumes, and a dedicated AI search strategist. All plans include limited agentic-workflow trial runs; Enterprise offers full access. The platform targets marketers tracking brand visibility in AI search, not solopreneurs drafting blog posts or emails in isolation.

items: If you're already using Notion for project management and need inline writing help, contact Notion for current AI add-on pricing.
If you need general-purpose conversational AI and can tolerate uncertain pricing, reach out to OpenAI for ChatGPT plan details.
If you're running a content marketing operation and want to track how AI platforms cite your brand, Writesonic's Starter or Basic plans provide visibility monitoring plus modest article quotas.
If you're shopping for dedicated long-form or short-form writing tools, contact Jasper and Copy.ai directly—public pricing and feature lists were unavailable as of May 2026.
Writesonic if you need a pure writing assistant with no interest in AI search tracking—its pricing is built around visibility monitoring, not standalone content generation.
Any tool without published pricing if you're on a tight timeline—chasing quotes from ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, and Notion AI sales teams burns days you could spend writing.
